name: nocal
title: nocal
description: Search notes and manage your day from Raycast with nocal.
author: brianmuse

preferences.name: apiBaseUrl
preferences.title: API Base URL
preferences.description: Override the nocal API base URL (leave blank to use the default).

preferences.name: authBaseUrl
preferences.title: Auth Base URL
preferences.description: Override the nocal OAuth server URL (leave blank to use the default).

commands.name: search-notes
commands.title: Search Notes
commands.subtitle: nocal
commands.description: Browse and search your nocal notes with live preview

commands.name: create-note
commands.title: Create Note
commands.subtitle: nocal
commands.description: Quickly capture a new note in nocal

commands.name: needs-rsvp
commands.title: Pending RSVPs
commands.subtitle: nocal
commands.description: Review calendar events awaiting your response and RSVP directly from Raycast

commands.name: upcoming-meetings
commands.title: Upcoming Meetings
commands.subtitle: nocal
commands.description: View your next meetings and join video calls without switching apps
